name: palinex
description: MCP server exposing render_surface — wraps a2ui v0.9 payloads as ui:// MCP UI resources.
long_description: Palinex wraps a2ui v0.9 surface payloads as MCP UI resources. Exposes a single tool, render_surface, that takes a surface payload and returns a ui:// resource pointing at the palinex renderer hosted at hellblazer.github.io/palinex. Hosts that mount ui:// HTML resources as inline iframes (claude.ai web, custom MCP UI hosts) display the rendered surface; Claude Desktop currently returns the resource envelope as text rather than mounting it inline — use the embedded-artifact or external-URL delivery shapes documented in palinex RDR-001 §Item 4 for Desktop until that lands. Optional nexus integration resolves chash references in the payload against nexus T3 when nexus is also installed.
